subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by divine bounties! Some believe that salvation's cause is the confession of God's oneness, while others [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر بالطاف یزدانی قومی بر آنند که سبب نجات اقرار بوحدانیت الهیست و حزبی
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @goodly deeds; actions
